item.title: “This is the future of the country. If you’re not paying attention now and doing something about it, you’ll have to sit down the rest of your life because democracy is being taken away.”

item.title: Pool noodles with no pool to be found
item.description: I hope you smile or crack a mental smirk today, from this or an unrelated thing - even if only a brief moment. Cheers!!

item.dc:creator: OnlyWantToSayOneThing

item.title: I DID IT! IM FREE.
item.description: for those of you just joining us, here a quick recap. my "mom" found out i was trans and went on a hours long religious tantrum where she disowned me and gave me 7 days to move out of the house she was selling. well, i did. in 3 days (more like 2 1/2 but whatever) i managed to rent a 2 bed/1 bath apartment for about 825 a month. so suck it bitch. you said i wasnt allowed to be who i am under your roof? well guess who roof i live under now. Edit: typo
item.dc:creator: AllSeeingAvalin

item.title: Making the world a better place
item.dc:creator: Cyberball2073

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1478 (chainmail booty shorts)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
I wonder how the ranking is going to be determined.
I dreamed of being stuck on an island in a lake for the winter, abandoned by my parents, though I still had the car. And my roman reenactment gear. Also, I was about 16 at the time. Eventually got rescued but it was pretty close after that big snowstorm came.
Love me some Milo.
So many people in Sedona think Sedona is like this.
I always love seeing jumping spiders.
Or me, dissociating, wondering if I'll be rescuing a bird of prey from the side of the road next. I won't lie, I'd love to be a falconer with a Kestrel or a Merlin. (Yes, that is a small falcon.)
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "What are you doing?" ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Flock surveillance in 49 states
item.description: https://www.youtube.com/shorts/0T7GWCVkeZY The channel: More Perfect Union, has some pretty eye-opening stories. The West Virginia one is notable. https://www.youtube.com/@moreperfectunion/videos Stay safe
item.dc:creator: ninjafartball

item.title: Lmao, tiktok ban is still going forward, it's gonna be a new app
item.description: https://www.techdirt.com/2025/09/17/tiktok-to-be-sold-to-trumps-right-wing-billionaire-buddies-and-converted-into-a-propaganda-mill/
item.dc:creator: NoCapForRealForReal

item.title: Imgur deleted this first time...
item.description: Not including the en-pee-ar link in case that was what triggered the deletion. The full article includes interviews with three people, interviews which are well worth reading no matter what side of the 'debate' you are on (side A being "all humans deserve human rights" vs side B which is the opposite 'opinion').

item.title: What's next, Mickey? Thought crimes?
item.description: The canceling of Jimmy Kimmel is another nail in the coffin of American democracy. I suggest we all fight with our wallets. Money is the only thing fascist oligarchs really believe in.

item.title: Prediction Machine
item.description: We've been making comics every week for the last 14 years – rain or shine! Every time a reader like you decides to support our work via Patreon, it means we get to keep on going. We plan to be around for the upcoming 14 years – thanks to our community! https://www.patreon.com/join/warandpeas
item.dc:creator: Warandpeasofficial
